title: Mary and the Giant
author: Philip K. Dick
card_summary: A mainstream novel written in the 1950s and published posthumously in 1987. Set in a small California town, it follows a young woman's relationships with older men, including a Black jazz musician, against the backdrop of 1950s racial tensions and provincial conformity. Reflects Dick's ambitions as a realist literary novelist. Ace Books EPUB edition.
